rules.statement: Only infrastructure, Body layer, and shared services MAY directly import database session primitives (get_session, AsyncSession). Mind and Will layers MUST use dependency injection.
rules.rationale: Direct database access in Mind (law) or Will (decision) layers violates constitutional separation. Law must not execute; decisions must not implement.

rules.statement: Only infrastructure layer and bootstrap modules MAY directly import Settings objects. All other components MUST receive configuration through dependency injection or environment abstraction.
rules.rationale: Direct settings access couples components to environment configuration, preventing testability and governance transparency.

rules.statement: Only Body layer and infrastructure components MAY directly instantiate FileHandler. Will and Mind layers MUST delegate file operations to Body services.
rules.rationale: File operations are execution. Will layer (decision) and Mind layer (law) must not perform I/O directly.

rules.statement: Only Will layer agents and autonomous services MAY directly import LLM client infrastructure. Body layer MUST NOT make AI decisions; Mind layer MUST NOT invoke AI.
rules.rationale: LLM access is decision-making capability. Only Will layer (judgment) may decide. Body (execution) and Mind (law) must not invoke AI.

rules.statement: Embedding capability MUST be obtained through CognitiveEmbedderAdapter (Vectorizer role, DB-backed registry). Direct import of EmbeddingService or build_embedder_from_env from shared.utils.embedding_utils is prohibited outside shared infrastructure. All other layers receive an injected embedder via dependency injection.
rules.rationale: EmbeddingService reads LOCAL_EMBEDDING_API_URL from env/settings, bypassing the DB-backed resource registry (core.llm_resources + role assignments). Constructing it directly decouples resource configuration from governance. All embedding access outside shared infrastructure MUST resolve through CognitiveService → Vectorizer role → CognitiveEmbedderAdapter so that host, model, and timeout are operator-governed and auditable.
